title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video tutorial demonstrating how to build a role-based access control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video covers database generation, workflows, automations, and role-based permissions without requiring multiple AI prompts.
